text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's Umamusume quiz time! Our<n>questions will
cover everything from<n>histories to hobbies. Are
you ready to<n>be tested on your Uma knowledge?
choice_data_list: What's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Our love of Umamusume is the<n>number one thing
the two of us have<n>in common, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yet, I'm the only one who ever<n>shares my
thoughts! I never see you<n>nerd out... like ever.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Then I realized why. It's because...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can be a little much, right?! It must<n>be hard for
you to pitch in when I'm<n>being so loud all the time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: If so, then know that I'm so sorry!I want you to be able to express yourjoy when you feel like it too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, if possible, I wanna know all<n>about what you
look for in your oshis!<n>I wanna simp over them
with you! We<n>shouldn't keep our passions to
ourselves! We have to share!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's when I came up with the idea<n>that an
Umamusume quiz might help<n>loosen up your
tongue!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This isn't about finding out who's the<n>best or
anything like that! It's about<n>sharing! Think of it
like one of those<n>Umatter updates they do
sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In other words, she's manufacturing<n>an
opportunity for us to have a fun<n>discussion about
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, are you ready?! Let's get started!<n>In three,
two, one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! This one is multiple choice!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You certainly know Rice Shower. Sheseems fragile on the surface—somuch so you wanna protect her fromall possible harm. But deep inside, she's the toughest! Swoon...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Anyways! Here's the question! What<n>does Rice
prefer to eat for breakfast?<n>Rice or bread?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer! Let your explosive love<n>for
Umamusume ignite!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh! Too bad! Sorry to say, but thatis incorrect.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's okay, though! We all make<n>mistakes!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What's important is what you do<n>after! So,
remember what happened<n>here when you go
home today,<n>m'kay! And then, you can dip your
toe back into hardcore simping!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'll have to up my Uma<n>knowledge if I
want to try and keep<n>up with Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Woohooo! That... is... CORRECT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Her name may be Rice, but she<n>actually prefers
bread. One time, I<n>saw her blush at the
contradiction,<n>and it was soooo precious I was
sent<n>straight to heaven, yessiree.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Splendid work, Trainer! You're doing<n>us Uma
simps proud!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, hold onto that energy, 'cause<n>now I
wanna move onto oshi talk!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Who are you simping for recently?<n>Ah, wait... that
sounds a little<n>disrespectful to the oshis you've
been simping for up until now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which also can't be right... right? We<n>love all our
oshis equally—it's just,<n>sometimes, certain ones
take the<n>spotlight partly 'cause of their<n>sparkle...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As a result of the sudden quiz, Agnes<n>Digital goes
off on a really long<n>tangent.
